codeReview.summary: Comprehensive cross-area integration tests covering all VAL-CROSS assertions. The implementation adds 24 well-structured integration tests that verify end-to-end flows across Widget, CLI, and Worker components. A minor but important modification to GET /spikes endpoint enables public access when filtering by project, allowing share owners to pull feedback without admin tokens. All 284 tests pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker skill should document the pattern for allowing public access to certain endpoints based on query parameters. The GET /spikes endpoint now allows public access when project parameter is present, but this pattern isn't documented in AGENTS.md or the skill file.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker/src/index.ts:78-86 — new conditional logic for public access based on project parameter

sharedStateObservations.observation: The test file uses a pattern of creating helper functions (createUserWithToken, countSpikes, countShares) that could be extracted to test/helpers.ts for reuse across other test files.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker/test/cross-area-flows.test.ts:33-85 — helper functions defined inline in test file that could be shared

summary: The cross-area-integration feature is fully implemented and passes review. The 24 new integration tests comprehensively cover all VAL-CROSS assertions (001-005) including share flows, upgrade flows, auth gating, password protection, and widget-to-CLI feedback. All 284 tests pass, TypeScript compiles without errors, and the CLI tests remain unaffected. No blocking issues found.
